name: ritsu-mcp-server
description: Ritsu MCP Server SDK — 结构化 I/O 原语，供 AI 技能调用

scripts.version:check: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); const pv=pkg.ritsu_protocol_version; const schema=require('fs').readFileSync(require('path').resolve(__dirname,'../_shared/ctx-event-schema.json'),'utf8'); const sv=schema.match(/v(3\.\d+\.\d+)/)?.[1]; if(pv!==sv){console.error('Protocol version mismatch: runtime expects '+pv+' but skills define '+sv);process.exit(1)}console.log('Protocol aligned: '+pv+' (runtime: '+pkg.version+')')"
